---
title: "Interactive Regression Tree Viewer"
---

Explore the regression plan tree generated by NL-PDDL. Click on nodes to see the execution path, preconditions, and grounded actions at each planning step.

### How to use

- **Click a node** to see its detail panel (execution plan, required state, grounded actions).
- **Use the slider** to step through subgoal iterations and watch the tree grow.
- **Prev / Next buttons** cycle through multiple result files (if the viewer was generated from a directory).
- **Scroll / zoom** within the tree pane to navigate large plans.

### Generate your own viewer

```bash
# From a single result file
python -m pddl_planner.plan_viewer path/to/result.txt

# From a directory of results
python -m pddl_planner.plan_viewer path/to/results_dir/

# Save to a specific output file without opening the browser
python -m pddl_planner.plan_viewer path/to/result.txt -o viewer.html --no-open
```

### Demo

The viewer below was generated from the Misalignment Blocksworld dataset (depth 4).

[Open in full page](_assets/plan_viewer_demo.html){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-light .btn-sm}

```{=html}
<iframe src="_assets/plan_viewer_demo.html" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: 1px solid #444; border-radius: 6px;"></iframe>
```
